brand.name: WagyuTank
brand.tagline: The world's marketplace & knowledge hub for frozen Wagyu genetics
brand.legal: Salt Lake City, Utah, USA · a Utah company
brand.titleLong: WagyuTank — The Global Marketplace & Knowledge Hub for Wagyu Genetics
brand.footerBlurb: the world's marketplace for frozen Wagyu genetics
brand.description: Buy and sell frozen Wagyu genetics — semen, embryos, and cloning rights — and explore the world's deepest Wagyu breed history, a live genetics price index, translated global news, and market data. Free to list.

products.label: Semen
products.blurb: Conventional & sexed, from proven Wagyu sires worldwide.

products.label: Embryos
products.blurb: Full-blood IVF & in-vivo embryos, sire × dam pedigrees.

products.label: Cloning Rights
products.blurb: License the right to clone a banked cell line. Ours alone.

vocab.help_nuance: Use 'Akaushi' rather than 'Red Wagyu'. Wagyu = 'Japanese cattle' (an umbrella); Japanese Black and Akaushi are distinct breeds.

jobs.vps_note: LEGACY: wagyu's VPS jobs run as systemd timers (wagyutank-news 3x/day 05/13/21:15, wagyutank-aggregate daily 06:38, wagyutank-digest weekly Mon 14:00 UTC) plus a root cron watchdog at 11:30 — predates the hatchery; managed outside it. The hatchery jobs phase reports their health but does not touch them.
